summary: Colombia provides comprehensive digital procurement through SECOP II (Sistema Electronico de Contratacion Publica), managed by Colombia Compra Eficiente. SECOP II supports end-to-end transactional e-procurement including planning, tendering, evaluation, and contract management. Colombia is a leading adopter of the Open Contracting Data Standard (OCDS).
notes: Colombia was one of the first countries to fully adopt OCDS for procurement data publication, enabling transparency and analytics. SECOP II replaced the earlier SECOP I (information-only) platform with full transactional capabilities. The Tienda Virtual del Estado Colombiano provides a digital marketplace for framework agreements.
